## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is coherent and no unrelated cleanup is included.
- [ ] Formatting, lint, type checking, and relevant tests pass.
- [ ] Security/privacy impact reviewed.
- [ ] Evidence is linked.
- [ ] Docs and task status updated.
- [ ] No secret, private data, or generated junk is committed.
- [ ] Claims match actual behavior.
